hero.taglineLine1: I build complete software products, from architecture to production.
hero.taglineLine2: Not just code. Systems that work, ship, and generate revenue.

about.label: About
about.p1: Over the past several years I have independently designed, developed, deployed, and commercialized multiple production software products, managing every stage from system architecture and backend development to cloud infrastructure, client delivery, and ongoing support.
about.p2: My stack spans Python, FastAPI, React, Electron, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, and LLM integration. I have delivered solutions for 20+ business clients across education, automation, digital forensics, and e-commerce.
about.p3: What makes me different: I think like a founder. Every system I build is designed to solve a real problem, survive production, and deliver measurable business value, not just pass a code review.

products.title: Commercial Products
products.subtitle: Software I built, deployed, and commercialized, now in production with real users

csv.desc: AI-powered SaaS platform that transforms hours of manual spreadsheet work into 2-minute automated pipelines. Non-technical users can enrich, classify, and clean CSV data at scale using reusable templates and custom business profiles that inject context directly into OpenAI prompts.

highlights.item1: Reusable AI templates with customizable business profiles
highlights.item3: Batch processing for large datasets without overloading the API
highlights.item4: Supabase auth, PostgreSQL, and Cloudflare in real production infrastructure

vioagents.type: Multi-tenant SaaS - AI Agents for Business
vioagents.desc: Conversational AI platform for business automation. Specialized agents for sales, appointment booking, and FAQ handling, powered by a custom cognitive orchestration system that eliminates hallucinations when working with real catalogs and live calendars.

highlights.item1: Custom AI orchestration architecture with no LangChain dependency
highlights.item2: Google Calendar integration for real appointment booking
highlights.item3: Intelligent CSV catalog search with cross-sell and upsell logic
highlights.item4: Auto-generated PDF quotes and embeddable widget

massmsg.desc: Desktop automation platform for high-volume messaging workflows. It runs entirely locally using the user's own Chrome profile and residential IP, making it indistinguishable from manual operation.

highlights.item1: Stealth engine with variable typing speed, simulated human error, and bio-pauses
highlights.item2: RSA + HWID cryptographic licensing locked per device
highlights.item3: Heartbeat system to prevent zombie processes on crashes
highlights.item4: Supports WhatsApp Web, Gmail, and Google Messages

forensic.desc: Desktop application for legal-grade digital evidence acquisition. It extracts and cryptographically seals WhatsApp conversations and Android content, generating SHA-256 certified PDF reports suitable for legal proceedings.

highlights.item1: SHA-256 integrity calculated immediately on extraction
highlights.item2: Auto-generated forensic PDF certificates with chain-of-custody data
highlights.item3: Dual extraction: WhatsApp Web with Playwright and Android storage with ADB
highlights.item4: 100% local processing with zero data leaving the analyst's machine

project5.title: Excel Scraper
project5.desc: Tool for automatic data consolidation from multiple Excel files. Processes and combines information from different sources, applying business rules and generating custom reports.

csvEnricherProject.title: CSV Enricher
csvEnricherProject.subtitle: AI-powered SaaS platform that transforms hours of manual spreadsheet processing into a 2-minute automated pipeline, without requiring users to write a single prompt.

liveCard.description: CSV Enricher is live and in production at csvanalyst.com. You can create a free account, upload a sample CSV, and run the Resume Screening template in under 2 minutes, with no credit card required for the initial trial.

steps.item1: Upload a CSV with text columns such as resumes, leads, tickets, or keywords.
steps.item2: Set your context by filling out MyProfile once with your evaluation criteria.
steps.item3: Run the template and the AI processes every row using that context to return an enriched CSV.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.heading: AI is powerful. Using it well on spreadsheets is painful.
problem.p1: Professionals in HR, sales, finance, and marketing handle hundreds or thousands of rows of unstructured CSV data every week. The manual process of reading, judging, and writing results is slow, inconsistent, and impossible to scale.
problem.p2: Existing solutions require prompt engineering skills that most users do not have, or they are so generic that they cannot adapt to a company's actual criteria. The gap between I have this data and I need intelligence applied to it was enormous.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.heading: Business context-aware AI pipelines, no code required.
solution.p1: CSV Enricher allows users to define their business context once through MyProfile and reuse it across hundreds of runs. The platform translates those visual forms into optimized LLM prompts invisibly and consistently.
solution.p2: A recruiter who needs to screen 500 resumes defines the ideal candidate profile once, uploads the CSV, and gets back a prioritized list with scores, reasoning, and recommendations in under 2 minutes.

templates.title: Reusable AI Templates
templates.desc: Industry-specific templates such as Resume Screening, Lead Enrichment, Invoice Processing, and Keyword Classification, all activatable with one click.

profile.title: MyProfile, the context injection engine
profile.desc: A visual form where users define their business criteria. That context is automatically injected into every prompt so the AI behaves like an expert in that specific domain.

batch.title: Batch processing pipeline
batch.desc: Large CSVs are split into optimized batches and processed without overwhelming the OpenAI API. Includes rate limiting, retries, and progress tracking.

billing.title: Full Stripe monetization
billing.desc: Subscriptions, credit-based billing, Stripe Checkout, and secure webhook handling, fully integrated in production.

hr.title: HR and recruiting teams
hr.desc: Mass resume screening with customizable criteria.

sales.title: Sales and marketing
sales.desc: Lead scoring, enrichment, and intent classification at scale.

support.title: Customer support
support.desc: Ticket categorization by urgency and sentiment for triage workflows.

seo.title: SEO agencies
seo.desc: Bulk keyword classification and search intent analysis.

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.desc: Planned features include real-time processing with WebSockets, native integrations with HubSpot, Salesforce, and Google Sheets, a conversational pipeline configurator, and parallel processing with Celery/Redis for enterprise datasets.

upload.title: Upload CSV
upload.desc: Drag any spreadsheet with text content

context.title: Set Context
context.desc: MyProfile injects business criteria into every prompt

batch.title: Batch Process
batch.desc: The OpenAI API is called in optimized batches with retry logic

download.title: Download Results
download.desc: Enriched CSV ready in about 2 minutes

context.title: Context injection at scale
context.problem: Standard LLM wrappers generate generic results because they lack specific business logic. Users do not know how to write complex system prompts.
context.solution: The MyProfile engine translates a visual form with business criteria into a structured optimized meta-prompt that gets injected invisibly into each batch.

rate.title: API rate limiting and failures
rate.problem: Sending a 5,000-row CSV directly to the OpenAI API causes token limit issues, timeouts, and major failures.
rate.solution: A resilient FastAPI batch-processing queue dynamically chunks the CSV, monitors OpenAI headers, applies backoff, and retries failed chunks automatically.

hr.name: HR and recruiting teams
hr.quote: Evaluating 500 applicants used to take two full days of reading and manual scoring. The pipeline now scores and ranks them based on specific criteria in under 2 minutes.

ux.name: Zero prompt engineering
ux.quote: The biggest barrier to AI adoption in B2B is the blank text box. Using prebuilt templates, operators get enterprise-grade results without writing a single prompt.

vioagentsProject.subtitle: Conversational AI platform that deploys specialized agents for sales, appointment booking, and support, using a custom cognitive orchestration system designed to eliminate hallucinations on real data.

liveCard.description: The VioAgents widget is live. You can test the agent's ability to search catalogs, handle objections, and book appointments inside a real conversational flow.

items.sales: Sales: ask for recommendations or prices and you will see that it only quotes real products from the CSV catalog.
items.booking: Booking: try to reserve an appointment and you will see that it checks Google Calendar in real time and avoids double bookings.
items.support: Support: ask complex policy questions and you will get answers grounded in its Markdown knowledge base.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.heading: Traditional chatbots are rigid. LLM wrappers hallucinate.
problem.p1: SMBs lose leads every day because they cannot respond outside business hours. Rule-based chatbots do not handle natural language and generic LLM integrations invent prices, availability, and policies.
problem.p2: The market needed an agent that speaks naturally, knows the real catalog, books real appointments, and never invents information it does not have.

architecture.title: Architecture: M1 -> M2 -> M3
architecture.heading: Custom cognitive orchestration, no LangChain and no AutoGen.
architecture.p1: Instead of depending on external orchestration frameworks, VioAgents uses a three-moment system with strict data validation at each gate. That guarantees the agent never answers with invented data.

sales.title: Sales Agent
sales.desc: Intelligent search over CSV catalogs, multi-query support, cross-sell suggestions, and PDF quote generation when the customer's name is provided.

booking.title: Booking Agent
booking.desc: Real Google Calendar integration. Checks live availability, blocks slots, prevents duplicates, and suggests alternatives in natural conversation.

faq.title: FAQ and knowledge agent
faq.desc: Consumes structured Markdown knowledge bases. If frustration or escalation is detected, it pauses the flow and notifies a human operator with full context.

multitenancy.title: Multi-tenancy and scalability
multitenancy.heading: Onboarding a new client takes minutes, not days.
multitenancy.p1: VioAgents uses a three-level configuration hierarchy: Domain -> Niche -> Business. Cognitive rules and sector vocabulary are inherited automatically; each client only needs its specific policies and catalog files added. The widget embeds with exactly 2 lines of code.

steps.receptor: Parses user intent and validates missing requirements.
steps.gatekeeper: Halts the flow if data is missing and asks the user naturally.
steps.specialist: Executes tool calls such as Google Calendar and database queries.
steps.grounding: Drafts the final response using only exact data returned by M2.

hallucinations.title: AI hallucinating prices and stock
hallucinations.problem: Basic LLM integrations often invent a price or confirm an appointment slot that does not exist just to sound helpful.
hallucinations.solution: Architectural isolation in M3. M3 does not access internal knowledge; it only formats the strict JSON returned by M2.

loops.title: Frustrating bot loops
loops.problem: Users hate when a bot gets stuck in loops and refuses to hand off to a human, causing dropped leads and bad reviews.
loops.solution: Native sentiment analysis and explicit handoff detection. If frustration is detected, the bot pauses and notifies a human operator.

booking.name: Lead capture and booking
booking.quote: Instead of sending leads to a static form where many drop off, the agent books them directly into Google Calendar instantly, 24/7.

scale.name: Speed and scalability
scale.quote: Adding a new client in a supported niche takes minutes. You just add their CSV catalog and tenant_defaults.md file, and the agent inherits the domain rules automatically.

massmsgProject.subtitle: Desktop RPA platform that automates high-volume messaging workflows with Electron, FastAPI, and Playwright, including a stealth human-emulation engine that makes the automation indistinguishable from real behavior.

securityGuide.title: Why standard bots get banned
securityGuide.desc: Cloud automation tools inject requests or use headless browsers from datacenter IPs. Platforms detect this immediately. MassMSG controls your real local Chrome, types letter by letter with variable delay, and even corrects mistakes like a human.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.heading: Official messaging APIs are expensive, restrictive, and detectable.
problem.p1: WhatsApp Business API charges per conversation and requires template pre-approval. Cloud bulk messaging tools use shared datacenter IPs that get detected and blocked within minutes. Many open-source alternatives also require significant technical skill.
problem.p2: SMBs needed a local solution that runs on their own machine, uses their real account and residential IP, and looks fully human to the platform's security systems.

architecture.title: Architecture: dual interface design
architecture.heading: One engine, two interfaces: local, portable, and zero cloud dependency.

typo.title: Typo Engine: human keystroke emulation
typo.desc: Variable per-key delays, random mistakes corrected with Backspace, and simulated thinking pauses. Characters are typed one by one and never injected.

pauses.title: Bio-pauses: real workday simulation
pauses.desc: Random distraction pauses, coffee breaks, and longer breaks on large batches. Every delay has random variance to avoid detectable patterns.

fingerprint.title: Residential IP and native fingerprint
fingerprint.desc: Runs on the user's real Chrome with the true browser fingerprint and home IP, identical to manual operation. Platforms cannot distinguish it from organic use.

session.title: Persistent session and portability
session.desc: The Chrome profile is stored in prod_browser_profile/ and the QR is scanned only once. Moving the folder preserves the full session without reconfiguration.

load.title: Load Data
load.desc: Import CSV or Excel with contacts and custom variables.

bind.title: Chrome Bind
bind.desc: Connects via CDP to the user's native Chrome session.

emulate.title: Emulate
emulate.desc: Types characters using the biological Typo Engine.

pauses.title: Bio-Pauses
pauses.desc: Executes random pauses to evade detection heuristics.

bans.title: Cloud API and tooling bans
bans.problem: Cloud mass messaging SaaS tools get blocked quickly because Meta detects their datacenter IPs and headless browser signatures.
bans.solution: MassMSG is a local desktop app. It uses the user's organic residential IP and native browser fingerprint, making it indistinguishable from human use.

zombies.title: Orphaned zombie processes
zombies.problem: When bundling Python with Electron, if the user force-quits the UI, the Python backend can stay alive in RAM as a memory leak.
zombies.solution: A double-safety Heartbeat system. The React UI sends a ping every 5 seconds and, if Python detects 15 seconds without signal, it self-terminates immediately.

cost.name: Zero cost per message
cost.quote: Official APIs charge per conversation and impose rigid template rules. Because MassMSG behaves like a human, users can send thousands of personalized messages without paying API fees.

privacy.name: Absolute privacy
privacy.quote: Businesses no longer need to upload their client databases to external servers. Everything runs and stays strictly on their own local machine.

forensicSuiteProject.title: Forensic Data Extractor Suite
forensicSuiteProject.subtitle: Desktop application for legal-grade digital evidence acquisition. It extracts and cryptographically seals content from WhatsApp Web and Android devices, producing SHA-256 certified forensic PDF reports suitable for court.

pdfGuide.title: The output
pdfGuide.desc: The system generates a formal PDF with an inventory of every extracted file and its computed SHA-256 hash. Because that hash is generated at the exact moment the buffer is written to disk, any later alteration changes the hash and protects the chain of custody.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.heading: Screenshots do not stand up in court. Chain of custody breaks easily.
problem.p1: In civil and labor litigation, WhatsApp messages are critical evidence. But screenshots are easily manipulated and any attorney can claim they were edited with Photoshop or DevTools. Courts often reject them.
problem.p2: Enterprise forensic tools cost thousands of dollars per year and require specialized certifications. Independent attorneys, forensic analysts, and private agencies had no accessible alternative with legal admissibility standards.

hash.title: Immediate SHA-256 hashing
hash.desc: The hash is calculated at the buffer level at the exact moment data is written to disk, before the PDF is generated. Any later modification changes the hash and proves tampering mathematically.

pdf.title: Automated forensic certificate
pdf.desc: The PDF contains ISO 8601 timestamp, software version, analyst name, module used, and SHA-256 fingerprint for each extracted file. It is designed for direct presentation before a judge or notary.

dual.title: Dual extraction: web and physical
dual.desc: Logical: Playwright traverses WhatsApp Web and reads native DOM metadata such as author and timestamp. Physical: ADB extracts EXIF metadata from images, including GPS coordinates and capture date.

local.title: 100% local, air-gap capable
local.desc: No evidence data is transmitted over the internet. The ADB binary is bundled in bin/, with no Android SDK required. It can run in courtrooms or locations without connectivity.

market.title: Target Market
market.desc: Built for legal professionals who need court-admissible digital evidence without enterprise software budgets: civil litigators, private investigation agencies, corporate auditors, and independent forensic consultants. Priced at $350-$499 per year per device with an optional maintenance plan.

logical.title: Logical Fetch
logical.desc: Playwright scrolls and extracts raw text plus metadata.

physical.title: Physical Pull
physical.desc: ADB extracts original media with EXIF metadata intact.

hash.title: Hash Seal
hash.desc: Immediate SHA-256 calculation at buffer level.

report.title: PDF Report
report.desc: Generates an extraction certificate ready for court.

screenshots.title: Inadmissibility of screenshots
screenshots.problem: Lawyers lose cases because the opposing side argues that WhatsApp screenshots can be forged easily with Photoshop or DevTools.
screenshots.solution: Zero-time-gap cryptography. The system calculates the SHA-256 hash at the exact millisecond the buffer is written to disk, guaranteeing mathematical immutability.

portability.title: Hardware dependencies and portability
portability.problem: To perform physical extractions, many tools require installing heavy Android SDKs, making it impractical to run on improvised courtroom laptops.
portability.solution: Electron bundling. The core adb.exe binary ships inside the internal `bin` folder, allowing the app to function as a portable executable with zero external dependencies.

legal.name: Legal admissibility
legal.quote: Enterprise tools like Cellebrite cost thousands of dollars annually. This suite brings FBI and NOM-151 standard forensic extraction to independent attorneys at a fraction of the cost.

privacy.name: Total privacy
privacy.quote: Because everything runs locally as a native application, investigators can execute full extractions in air-gapped rooms without internet, ensuring absolute confidentiality.

schoolRecordsProject.title: AI School Records System
schoolRecordsProject.subtitle: Desktop application with Master-Student AI architecture that automates school certificate management, from conversational search to PDF generation. In production at educational institutions in Mexico.

video.title: Full System Demo - 18 minutes
video.description: End-to-end walkthrough: classic management interface, AI chat mode, natural student search with progressive filters, PDF certificate generation, and transformation of external PDFs.

guide.overviewDesc: Production-ready hybrid system combining a conversational assistant with a traditional administrative interface. School leaders query searches, statistics, and official certificates in natural language, while administration maintains full CRUD control. Everything runs 100% locally with SQLite and is distributed as a compiled PyInstaller executable.

partA.item1: Open classic management and show student records with name, CURP, enrollment ID, grade, group, and shift.
partA.item2: Transform card: select external PDF, extract data, and generate a correctly formatted certificate.
partA.item3: Search card: locate by name, grade, group, shift, enrollment ID, or CURP.
partA.item4: Management card (CRUD): edit, validate, and save with visual control.

partB.item1: "Find students with last name Garcia" -> list of results.
partB.item2: Contextual follow-up: "From that list, only evening shift" -> filtered.
partB.item3: Progressive refinement: "Now third grade" -> "Now group A".
partB.item4: "How many students are in third grade?" -> count and distribution.
partB.item5: "Generate the certificate for [Name]" -> the PDF opens automatically.
partB.item6: Attach external PDF and ask "Transform this PDF into an official certificate" -> extraction plus new PDF.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.heading: School staff spent 15 to 20 minutes per certificate. Manually.
problem.p1: In Mexican elementary schools, generating a student certificate requires locating the record, verifying CURP and enrollment data, filling a formatted document, and sending it to print, often with errors. In schools handling hundreds of certificates per month, that consumes full days of administrative work.
problem.p2: Existing school software was too expensive, too complex to deploy locally, or lacked natural-language interaction, forcing staff to navigate complicated menus for basic queries.

dual.title: Dual interface: AI chat and classic management
dual.desc: Two complementary views share the same SQLite backend. Chat for speed, CRUD for precision. Users switch between both without losing context.

certificate.title: Certificate generation and transformation
certificate.desc: Generates official PDF certificates from templates in 1 to 5 seconds. It can also receive an external PDF, extract data with pdfplumber, and reformat it into the official institution template.

filtering.title: Progressive natural-language filtering
filtering.desc: Allows chained conversational queries like "Garcia" -> "evening shift" -> "third grade" -> "group A", refining the result without resetting context.

distribution.title: Zero-dependency distribution
distribution.desc: Ships as a compiled executable with PyInstaller. Includes a monkey patch for google-generativeai, bundled wkhtmltopdf, and automatic `.env` loading.

pyinstaller.title: google-generativeai + PyInstaller
pyinstaller.problem: Imports and runtime broke after freezing. `.env` variables became inaccessible and the AI library conflicted with PyInstaller module collection.
pyinstaller.solution: Early monkey patch before any AI import, manual `.env` loading inside the executable, and custom hooks with multi-level model fallback.

routing.title: Intent routing and conversational context
routing.problem: Ambiguous references like "him", "the second one", or "from those...", and deciding when to use context and how to resolve pronouns across turns.
routing.solution: Unified analysis through `MasterPromptManager`, `conversation_stack` with `awaiting` states, and intelligent continuation logic comparing current vs previous intent.

consistency.title: Data consistency across modules
consistency.problem: Variants in names and fields across manual records broke searches and PDF templates with incorrect values.
consistency.solution: Centralized normalization layer in the `Config` class, validations with visible warnings before save, and configurable ordering per institution.

master.title: Master Interpreter
master.desc: Detects intent and sub-intents and manages the context stack.

routing.title: Specialist Routing
routing.desc: Routes to the Student or Help specialist based on the intent.

executor.title: Action Executor
executor.desc: Executes SQL query or PDF generation and returns the response.

director.name: Academic Director
director.quote: Before, staff spent 15 to 20 minutes per certificate searching physical files. Now the system generates everything in under 2 minutes just by typing the student's name.

secretary.name: School Secretary
secretary.quote: The AI perfectly understands when I say 'I need Juan's certificate from 5th grade B'. I no longer need to remember complicated procedures, I just speak naturally.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Senior Developer specialized in high-impact solutions and scalable systems
about.whoText: Senior full-stack developer specialized in creating high-impact technological solutions that solve real problems. Expert in conversational AI systems (adaptable to any LLM), scalable architectures and critical automation that generates 340% ROI. My experience spans modern web development (React/Flask), real-time mobile applications, hybrid desktop systems (PyQt), and complex algorithms. I combine technical innovation with measurable results: 85-95% time reductions, production systems serving real companies, and architectures ready to scale.
about.approachText: From intelligent web scraping to conversational interfaces, each project is designed to generate real impact and business value. I specialize in creating scalable architectures and high-performance systems, from low-latency applications (<8ms) with WebSockets to conversational systems adaptable to any LLM. I combine optimized UX/UI design with robust backend, complex algorithms and real-time data processing. My approach prioritizes both user experience and technical efficiency, creating maintainable solutions ready to evolve.

antiBotProtection.title: Anti-Bot Protection
antiBotProtection.problem: Amazon and MercadoLibre block automated requests.
antiBotProtection.solution: Rotating user-agents, random delays, realistic headers and Selenium for complex sites.

productFiltering.title: Product Filtering
productFiltering.problem: Searches return unwanted cables, stands and accessories.
productFiltering.solution: Configurable blacklist and specific RTX model validation.

pythonCompatibility.title: Python 3.13 Compatibility
pythonCompatibility.problem: Python 3.13 not compatible with precompiled psycopg2-binary.
pythonCompatibility.solution: Conditional imports and flexible database configuration.

scraping.title: 1. Automatic Scraping
scraping.desc: Data extraction from Amazon MX and MercadoLibre

visualization.title: 4. Visualization
visualization.desc: Web dashboard with charts and filters

video.title: Real-Time Price Monitor
video.description: Watch how the scraper automatically monitors RTX GPU prices across multiple platforms. Includes advanced filters, price alerts and dashboard with real-time statistics.

resourceLinks.sourceCodeDesc: Web scraper with Selenium and BeautifulSoup

enterpriseScraperProject.title: Enterprise E-Commerce Pipeline
enterpriseScraperProject.subtitle: Large-scale scraping across 40+ manufacturer sites to feed a central e-commerce platform

sections.overviewText: A massive data engineering pipeline built to feed an e-commerce business with inventory from more than 30 brands. The process had two phases: first, reverse engineering private APIs (network/XHR) from a central provider to obtain the base catalog at high speed. Second, building dynamic scrapers (1 to 3 per day) that navigated official manufacturer sites, bypassed anti-bot protections through JS injection, and extracted enriched specifications and images. The complexity of normalizing thousands of ambiguous extracted products is what inspired me to build CSV Analyst with AI.

networkAnalysis.title: API Reverse Engineering
networkAnalysis.desc: Network analysis (XHR) to intercept JSON responses and extract base data at scale

dynamicScraping.title: Dynamic Scraping and Evasion
dynamicScraping.desc: Per-site adaptable scripts, JS injection, and browser control to bypass protections

dataPipeline.title: Complete Pipeline
dataPipeline.desc: Automatic cleaning, formatting, and normalization for direct WooCommerce import

networkInterception.title: Base Extraction at Scale
networkInterception.problem: The central provider had a huge inventory hidden behind a slow web interface.
networkInterception.solution: Reverse engineering with DevTools to intercept API calls and obtain raw JSON directly.

uniqueArchitectures.title: 40+ Different Sites
uniqueArchitectures.problem: Each official manufacturer had a different site structure, protections, and data format.
uniqueArchitectures.solution: Agile development of 1 to 3 adaptable scrapers per day using dynamic selectors and Selenium.

dataNormalization.title: The Origin of CSV Analyst
dataNormalization.problem: The data arrived in ambiguous formats that were impossible to map with traditional rules.
dataNormalization.solution: This exposed the need for AI-based categorization, which directly led to CSV Analyst.

remoteMouseProject.title: Remote Mouse
remoteMouseProject.subtitle: Remote mouse and keyboard control from mobile devices via WebSocket

sections.videoDescription: Remote control demonstration in action from mobile device
sections.overviewText: Cross-platform application that allows controlling PC mouse and keyboard from a mobile device using real-time WebSocket communication. Includes a Python server with GUI for PC and a Flutter application for mobile devices with support for Android, iOS, Web, Windows, macOS and Linux. Offers precise cursor control, clicks, scroll, text input and key combinations with haptic feedback and customizable configuration.

mouseControl.title: Advanced Mouse Control
mouseControl.desc: Precise movement with optimization buffer, clicks and scroll with adjustable sensitivity

virtualKeyboard.title: Smart Virtual Keyboard
virtualKeyboard.desc: Real-time typing, special keys and combinations (Ctrl+C, Alt+Tab)

multiplatform.title: Cross-Platform Interface
multiplatform.desc: Native Flutter for mobile and Python GUI server, support for 6 platforms

architecture.title: Architecture
items: MVC in Flutter with modular services

latencyMovements.title: Movement Latency
latencyMovements.problem: Individual mouse movements generated too many WebSocket commands.
latencyMovements.solution: Movement buffer with 8ms timer to accumulate and send optimized deltas.

textSync.title: Text Synchronization
textSync.problem: Detecting text changes (add/delete) without losing synchronization.
textSync.solution: Tracking system with length comparison and differential command sending.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
crossPlatform.problem: Different OS behaviors for mouse/keyboard control.
crossPlatform.solution: Abstraction with PyAutoGUI and platform-specific configuration.

video.title: Ultra Low Latency Remote Control
video.description: Watch how the mobile app controls the PC cursor with less than 8ms latency. Includes multi-touch gestures, virtual keyboard and customizable shortcuts in real time.

socialMediaProject.title: Videos Downloader - Universal Video Downloader
socialMediaProject.subtitle: Download videos from Instagram, TikTok and Facebook with web interface

sections.videoDescription: Download from Instagram, TikTok and Facebook with multiple qualities
sections.overviewText: Flask web application that allows downloading videos from major social networks (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook) with multiple quality options. Includes a modern and responsive web interface, download history system, and modular architecture with multiple download methods to ensure high availability. The application automatically handles URL normalization, shortened link expansion, and provides a complete REST API for mobile application integration.

universalDownload.title: Universal Multi-Platform Download
universalDownload.desc: Automatic platform detection with intelligent URL normalization

robustBackup.title: Robust Backup System
robustBackup.desc: Multiple download methods with automatic fallback in case of failure

webInterface.title: Complete Web Interface
webInterface.desc: Responsive dashboard with history and REST API for mobile integration

urlVariations.title: Shortened URLs and Variations
urlVariations.problem: TikTok uses multiple URL formats (vm.tiktok.com, vt.tiktok.com).
urlVariations.solution: Normalization system with automatic expansion using requests.head().

multiPlatformReliability.title: Multi-Platform Reliability
multiPlatformReliability.problem: Social media APIs change frequently, causing failures.
multiPlatformReliability.solution: Multiple backup method architecture with automatic fallback.

fileManagement.title: File Management
fileManagement.problem: Efficient handling of downloaded files and storage cleanup.
fileManagement.solution: JSON history system with 50 entry limit and unique UUID names.

video.title: Universal Video Download
video.description: Watch how the application downloads videos from Instagram, TikTok and Facebook in seconds. Includes intuitive web interface, download history and support for multiple formats.

distanceCalculatorProject.title: Distance Calculator
distanceCalculatorProject.subtitle: Web tool for measuring distances between multiple points on maps

sections.videoDescription: Complete demonstration of distance calculation and interactive matrix
sections.overviewText: Interactive web application that allows users to establish a reference point and add multiple destinations to calculate real road distances or straight-line distances. Includes advanced features such as distance matrix between all points, destination reordering by priority, and real-time route visualization. The application is optimized for use with both place search and manual coordinates, offering a robust experience even with API limitations.

smartCalculation.title: Smart Distance Calculation
smartCalculation.desc: Dual system with Google Maps API and spherical geometric calculation as backup

interactiveInterface.title: Advanced Interactive Interface
interactiveInterface.desc: Place search, manual coordinates or direct clicks with drag-and-drop

distanceMatrix.title: Complete Distance Matrix
distanceMatrix.desc: Complete tables between all points for complex route planning

fallbackSystem.title: Fallback System
items: Google Maps API as primary method

apiLimitations.title: Google Maps API Limitations
apiLimitations.problem: Quota restrictions and possible connectivity failures with external APIs.
apiLimitations.solution: Automatic fallback system with spherical geometric calculations maintaining full functionality.

stateManagement.title: Complex State Management
stateManagement.problem: Synchronization between multiple markers, routes, and UI elements with dynamic reordering.
stateManagement.solution: Centralized update system that recalculates all dependencies when order is modified.

userExperience.title: Robust User Experience
userExperience.problem: Ensuring intuitive operation for both technical and non-technical users.
userExperience.solution: Hybrid interface supporting place search, manual coordinates, and map clicks with integrated guide.

video.title: Interactive Distance Calculation
video.description: Watch how the tool calculates distances between multiple points in real time. Includes distance matrix, destination reordering and optimized route visualization.

resourceLinks.localCodeDesc: Vanilla JavaScript with Google Maps API

excelScraperProject.title: Universal Excel Table Validation and Visualization System
excelScraperProject.subtitle: Universal system for Excel table validation and visualization

sections.videoDescription: Complete demonstration of 4-step workflow in Desktop and Web
sections.overviewText: Comprehensive platform that automates extraction, combination, validation and presentation of educational Excel tables, with a shared and reusable architecture between a desktop app (PyQt) and a modern web interface (React + Flask). The core implements a bidimensional algorithm for merged cell detection from [value] markers, generating precise spans, cleanly combined data and a robust foundation for universal validations.

bidimensionalAlgorithm.title: Bidimensional Merged Cell Algorithm
bidimensionalAlgorithm.desc: Detects horizontal/vertical spans based on [value] markers with cleanup and precise mergedCells generation

multiplatformArchitecture.title: Cross-Platform Architecture with Reusable Core
multiplatformArchitecture.desc: Desktop (PyQt) and Web (React/Flask) share business modules with specialized controllers

sophisticatedValidations.title: Sophisticated Educational Validations and 4-Step UI
sophisticatedValidations.desc: Consistency, subtotals, totals with Step 1-4 flow and Excel-like table with range selection

architecture.title: Architecture
items: Hybrid MVC/MVP in Desktop, REST client-server in Web
Isolation by sheet and by file

optimization.title: Optimization
items: Centralized configuration by period and mode

features.title: Advanced Features
items: 4-step UI with raw data as canonical source
Excel-like web interface with range selection

tabIsolation.title: Perfect Tab Isolation
tabIsolation.problem: Second tab didn't correctly detect already processed files and shared global state.
tabIsolation.solution: Tab/file-specific data in app_controller with dual verification and proceso_secuencial_activo saving.

step4Fallbacks.title: Incorrect Step 4 Due to Fallbacks
step4Fallbacks.problem: Step 4 showed Step 3 data (fallback to datos_numericos) and incomplete mappings.
step4Fallbacks.solution: Prioritize datos_paso4, eliminate problematic fallback and complete mapping for compatibility.

webLogicPort.title: Port Combination Logic to Web
webLogicPort.problem: Replicate bidimensional combination without infinite loops or re-renders in React.
webLogicPort.solution: Memoized pure function (useMemo/useCallback), mergedCells + dataToRender structure with controlled events.

step2.title: Step 2: Raw Data
step2.desc: Extraction and cleanup of original data

step3.title: Step 3: Visual Crop
step3.desc: Selection and adjustment of data ranges

sections.overviewText: A diverse collection of commercial websites developed for real clients across various industries. From high-converting landing pages to full e-commerce solutions on Shopify and custom WordPress themes. This portfolio demonstrates my strong foundation in frontend development, responsive design, SEO optimization, and delivering production-ready web experiences that drive business results.

botProject.title: Enterprise Multi-Bot AI System
botProject.subtitle: Multi-bot conversational AI platform with scalable modular architecture for enterprises

System developed with Node.js, Express.js, Supabase and Google Gemini AI that enables scalability for 50+ bots with centralized management. Currently operating 4 specialized bots (Solar Energy, Web Development, Real Estate, Restaurant) with master dashboard and real-time analytics.

schoolCertificateProject.title: AI School Certificate System
schoolCertificateProject.subtitle: Desktop app with AI that automates certificates and school management

sections.videoDescription: Complete demonstration of AI system in production
sections.overviewText: Desktop application (PyQt + PyInstaller) used in production by a school to replace secretarial tasks: student search/management, PDF certificate generation and transformation, intelligent queries and recommendations via AI. AI architecture with "Master Interpreter" that detects intention and sub-intentions and routes to specialists (Student/Help), integrating with local services (SQLite, PDF). Scalable and robust: improves with new AI models and stable packaging.

masterStudentRouting.title: Master-Student AI Routing
masterStudentRouting.desc: Master Interpreter detects intention and delegates to specialists with conversational memory

pdfGeneration.title: PDF Certificate Generation and Transformation
pdfGeneration.desc: wkhtmltopdf with templates, integrated preview and transformation of existing PDFs

aiArchitecture.title: AI Architecture
items: Serviceâ€“Repository for data separated from UI

pyinstallerIntegration.title: google-generativeai + PyInstaller
pyinstallerIntegration.problem: Broken import and runtime when freezing; inaccessible environment variables.
pyinstallerIntegration.solution: Early "monkey patch", manual .env loading in executable, configured hooks/paths with model fallback.

intentionRouting.title: Intention Routing + Context
intentionRouting.problem: Ambiguities ("he", "the second", "of those..."), deciding whether to use context and how to resolve references.
intentionRouting.solution: Unified analysis with MasterPromptManager; conversation_stack with awaiting; intelligent continuity.

dataConsistency.title: Data Normalization and Consistency
dataConsistency.problem: Name/field variants affect searches and certificates.
dataConsistency.solution: Centralized normalization in Config; validation with warnings; configuration-based sorting.

specializedRouting.title: 3. Specialized Routing
specializedRouting.desc: Routes to Student/Help based on context

academicDirector.quote: Before we took 15-20 minutes per certificate searching physical files. Now the system generates everything in less than 2 minutes just by typing the student's name.

schoolSecretary.title: School Secretary

partA.title: Part A â€” Classic Management (foundation)
partA.step2: Show student records and open a typical entry (name, CURP, matrÃ­cula, grade, group, shift)
partA.step3: Explain: this local SQLite DB is the system's single source of truth. AI answers and PDFs are grounded in this data
partA.step4: Card: Transform - Pick an external PDF; extract data; generate a properly formatted certificate
partA.step5: Card: Search & Generate Certificates - Search by name, grade, group, shift, matrÃ­cula, CURP
partA.step6: Card: Management (CRUD) - Edit/validate/save fields with visual control and auditability

partB.title: Part B â€” AI Chat (automatic)
partB.step2: Search by name: "Find students with last name Garcia" â†’ list results
partB.step3: Context continuation: "From that list, only afternoon shift" â†’ filtered results
partB.step4: Progressive narrowing: "Now third grade" â†’ "Now group A" â†’ refined results
partB.step5: Statistics: "How many students are in third grade?" â†’ count/distribution
partB.step6: Exact lookup: "Show the student with matrÃ­cula 2024001" (or by CURP)
partB.step7: Generate certificate: "Generate a certificate of studies for [Student Name]" â†’ PDF opens
partB.step8: Transform external PDF: attach sample â†’ "Transform this PDF to an official certificate" â†’ automatic extraction + PDF
partB.step9: Help: "What can you do?" â†’ capabilities overview in plain language

problem.desc: Validate coherence in tables with variable structures and complex data

solution.title: Solution:
solution.desc: Automatic validation system with state evidence and detailed reports

executiveOverview.title: Executive Summary
executiveOverview.content: Hybrid system that completely automates the processing of complex educational Excel tables. Shared architecture between desktop (PyQt) and web (React + Flask) with bidimensional algorithm for merged cell detection. Reduces 90-95% of manual processing time.

highlight.title: Innovative Hybrid Architecture
highlight.content: Combines desktop power with web accessibility, sharing the same business core to ensure consistency and maintainability.

detection.title: Marker Detection
detection.desc: Identifies [value] patterns in cells to determine horizontal and vertical spans

merging.title: Span Generation
merging.desc: Calculates precise mergedCells and automatically cleans combined data

validation.title: Universal Validation
validation.desc: Coherence, subtotals and totals with state evidence

desktop.title: Desktop (PyQt)
desktop.desc: Native interface with specialized controllers and direct file system access

web.title: Web (React + Flask)
web.desc: REST API with modern interface, Excel-like table and range selection

core.title: Shared Core
core.desc: Pure business modules without UI dependencies, reusable across platforms

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.item1: Shared business core between desktop and web
architecture.item2: Bidimensional algorithm for merged cell detection

security.title: Robustness
security.item3: Safe processing of complex Excel files

features.title: Advanced Features
features.item1: Automatic detection of complex table structures
features.item2: Excel-like web interface with range selection
features.item3: 4-step workflow with validations at each stage

dataAnalyst.title: Educational Data Analyst
dataAnalyst.quote: Before we spent hours manually processing each Excel file with merged cells. Now the system automatically detects the structure and validates everything in minutes.

developer.title: Team Developer
developer.quote: The hybrid architecture allows maintaining a single business core for desktop and web. The bidimensional algorithm is elegant and handles complex cases that other systems cannot.

sections.overviewText: Diverse collection of commercial websites developed for real clients across multiple industries. From high-conversion landing pages to full e-commerce solutions on Shopify and custom WordPress themes. This portfolio demonstrates my solid foundation in frontend development, responsive design, SEO optimization, and delivering production-ready web experiences that drive real business results.
sections.featuredSitesDesc: A selection of the most representative commercial web projects delivered to clients.

responsive.title: Mobile-First Responsive Design

seo.title: SEO and Performance
